quoteText: I am the least racist person you have ever interviewed.
impressionTip: Sound confident, repetitive, and slightly offended.

quoteText: My memory is so good I can remember things that never happened.
impressionTip: Repeat yourself, pause for emphasis, and use dramatic certainty.
Be intense, confident, and slightly theatrical.

quoteText: Nobody knows more about wind than me. I am basically wind.
impressionTip: Use big hand gestures and overconfident delivery.

quoteText: Sorry losers and haters, but my I.Q. is one of the highest and you all know it!
impressionTip: Sound braggy, fast, and slightly confrontational.
